business_ideas.idea: Cloud-based knowledge work platform enabling async collaboration with GitHub-like versioning
Decentralized media and finance platforms leveraging blockchain for open data and user control
Tech-forward infrastructure investments in America to compete with China geopolitically

predictions.text: Four major inflections happening now: blockchain, cloud office culture, America Next, cloud consumer metaverse
Network-capitalist companies will keep winning and displace industrial-capitalist companies
Privacy startups will become massive; people will regret giving tech companies so much data
